rides.title: Rides
rides.empty: No rides yet. Sign in as admin to import history or sync from Polar.

admin.title: Admin
admin.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

polar.title: Polar
polar.hint: Connect your Polar account so new rides sync automatically.

import.title: Import history
import.hint: Upload GPX/TCX files exported from Polar Flow.

sync.title: Sync
sync.hint: Pull new rides from Polar now.

maintenance.title: Maintenance
maintenance.reprocessHint: Recompute metrics for every ride from its stored files. Use this after a parser change to fix existing rides — including Polar-synced ones.
maintenance.deleteHint: Danger: delete every ride and its stored files. Polar-synced rides cannot be re-synced from Polar afterwards — only re-uploaded exports can be recovered.
maintenance.deleteConfirm1: Delete ALL rides and their stored files? This cannot be undone.
maintenance.deleteConfirm2: Polar-synced rides cannot be re-synced from Polar. Are you absolutely sure?
